title: CTE + funkcje okna: TOP N per grupa
intro: Połącz CTE i funkcje okna, aby wybrać najlepsze rekordy w każdej grupie.
explanation: Popularny wzorzec: w CTE liczysz ROW_NUMBER() dla każdej grupy (PARTITION BY), a potem wybierasz tylko rekordy z rn <= N. To daje np. TOP 3 produkty w każdej kategorii.

examples.query: WITH ranked AS (SELECT product_id, category_id, sales, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category_id ORDER BY sales DESC) AS rn FROM product_sales) SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3;
WITH ranked_orders AS (SELECT o.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at DESC) AS rn FROM orders o) SELECT * FROM ranked_orders WHERE rn = 1;

exercise: Wybierz 2 najwyżej opłacane osoby w każdym dziale z tabeli employees.
solutionHints: W CTE użyj ROW_NUMBER() PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY salary DESC.
expectedQueryPatterns: ROW_NUMBER\(\) OVER \(PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY salary DESC\)
